member.name: T:QuantityMeasurementWebAPI.Controllers.QuantitiesController
member.summary: Controller for quantity measurement operations This controller handles all HTTP requests related to quantity measurements

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementWebAPI.Controllers.QuantitiesController.#ctor(QuantityMeasurementBusinessLayer.Interface.IQuantityMeasurementService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{QuantityMeasurementWebAPI.Controllers.QuantitiesController})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the QuantitiesController Constructor that receives dependencies through Dependency Injection

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementWebAPI.Controllers.QuantitiesController.CompareQuantities(QuantityMeasurementModelLayer.DTOs.BinaryOperationRequestDto)
member.summary: Compares two quantities for equality HTTP POST endpoint that accepts JSON body with two quantities to compare
member.param: The quantities to compare (contained in request DTO)
member.returns: Comparison result indicating if quantities are equal
member.response: If the request is invalid or categories don't match
If an internal server error occurs

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementWebAPI.Controllers.QuantitiesController.ConvertQuantity(QuantityMeasurementModelLayer.DTOs.ConversionRequestDto)
member.summary: Converts a quantity to a different unit
member.param: The conversion request with source and target unit

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementWebAPI.Controllers.QuantitiesController.AddQuantities(QuantityMeasurementModelLayer.DTOs.BinaryOperationRequestDto)
member.param: The quantities to add with optional target unit

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementWebAPI.Controllers.QuantitiesController.SubtractQuantities(QuantityMeasurementModelLayer.DTOs.BinaryOperationRequestDto)
member.param: The quantities to subtract (first - second) with optional target unit

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementWebAPI.Controllers.QuantitiesController.GetHistory(System.Nullable{QuantityMeasurementModelLayer.DTOs.Enums.OperationType})
member.param: Optional operation type filter (if null, returns all)

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementWebAPI.Controllers.QuantitiesController.GetHistoryByCategory(System.String)
member.param: Category to filter by (LENGTH, WEIGHT, VOLUME, TEMPERATURE)
member.returns: List of measurement history records for the specified category

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementWebAPI.Controllers.QuantitiesController.GetHistoryByDateRange(System.DateTime,System.DateTime)
member.returns: List of measurement history records within the date range

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementWebAPI.Controllers.QuantitiesController.GetStatistics
member.returns: Statistics about operations (counts, success rates, etc.)

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementWebAPI.Controllers.QuantitiesController.GetOperationCount(QuantityMeasurementModelLayer.DTOs.Enums.OperationType)
member.summary: Gets operation count for a specific operation type
member.returns: Count of operations of that type

member.name: T:QuantityMeasurementWebAPI.Middleware.GlobalExceptionHandler
member.summary: Global exception handling middleware This middleware catches all unhandled exceptions and returns consistent error responses

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementWebAPI.Middleware.GlobalExceptionHandler.InvokeAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Invoke method called by the middleware pipeline for each HTTP request

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementWebAPI.Middleware.GlobalExceptionHandler.HandleExceptionAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext,System.Exception)
member.summary: Handles exceptions by creating appropriate HTTP responses
member.returns: Task representing the response writing operation

member.name: T:QuantityMeasurementWebAPI.Middleware.RateLimitingMiddleware
member.summary: Middleware for rate limiting to prevent brute force attacks This middleware tracks requests by IP address and limits the number of requests to the login endpoint within a specified time window

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementWebAPI.Middleware.RateLimitingMiddleware.#ctor(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.RequestDelegate,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{QuantityMeasurementWebAPI.Middleware.RateLimitingMiddleware})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the RateLimitingMiddleware

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementWebAPI.Middleware.RateLimitingMiddleware.InvokeAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Invokes the middleware for each HTTP request

member.name: T:QuantityMeasurementWebAPI.Middleware.RateLimitingMiddleware.ClientRequestInfo
member.summary: Helper class to track client request information

member.name: P:QuantityMeasurementWebAPI.Middleware.RateLimitingMiddleware.ClientRequestInfo.RequestCount
member.summary: Number of requests made in the current time window

member.name: P:QuantityMeasurementWebAPI.Middleware.RateLimitingMiddleware.ClientRequestInfo.WindowStart
member.summary: Start time of the current time window

member.name: T:QuantityMeasurementWebAPI.Middleware.SecurityHeadersMiddleware
member.summary: Middleware to add security headers to all HTTP responses Implements OWASP recommended security headers
